subject: [PATCH v7 03/10] mm/memory_hotplug: pass online_type to online_memory_block() via arg

2026-07-12.patch_summary: This patch modifies the `online_memory_block` function to accept an explicit online type through its argument, rather than using a default value. This change prepares for future scenarios where callers can specify their own online types. The patch also updates the `add_memory_resource` function to pass the default online type as a local variable. No functional changes are made, and the patch is reviewed by several kernel developers.
